data.title: NetDocuments acquires eDOCS from OpenText, expanding to 90+ countries, focusing on legal professionals.
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, NetDocuments, a cloud-native legal document management platform with AI capabilities, has finalized its acquisition of eDOCS from OpenText. The agreement encompasses the entire product range and the specialized eDOCS team. This move broadens NetDocuments’ reach to more than 90 countries and ensures the eDOCS community has a lasting home within a company exclusively dedicated to serving legal professionals. The acquisition strengthens NetDocuments’ capacity to offer top-tier services on a global scale.

data.title: Despite $286M in Bitcoin sold by 'OG whales,' chances of $100K BTC are still high amidst distribution slowdown and bullish momentum.
data.description: In January, large Bitcoin holders, known as whales, collectively sold around $286 million worth of BTC. However, recent trends indicate a decrease in selling activity among these whales and a surge in positive market sentiment, potentially propelling Bitcoin's price to $100,000 by the end of the month.

data.title: Facility Grid, provider of construction software, appoints Daniel Russo as CEO. Based in Mass, streamlines Cx and OR processes.
data.description: Facility Grid, a prominent company offering cloud-based software to optimize Cx and OR processes in construction, has named Daniel Russo as its new Chief Executive Officer.

data.title: Report projects small calibre military ammunition market growth till 2033 due to war demand in Ukraine & stockpile replenishment.Total market size, procurement ops highlighted with future insights.
data.description: A report titled "Small Calibre Military Ammunition - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This study offers insights into the market size and procurement opportunities, outlining the global scope, scale, and timelines of these opportunities. It provides a comprehensive analysis of the current landscape in the small calibre military ammunition industry and predicts future trends. This report aims to provide a thorough understanding of the market dynamics.

data.title: Camber renews CALSTART membership for fleet electrification, ongoing since June 2024, enhancing reliable solutions in US.
data.description: In San Francisco, Camber, a prominent provider of complete fleet electrification solutions, has confirmed the continuation of its CALSTART membership, which was initially established in June 2024. This renewal signifies Camber's dedication to enhancing feasible and dependable electrification for numerous fleet types, including transit, school buses, municipal vehicles, commercial fleets, and logistics fleets nationwide. The company's commitment to advancing electrification technologies and practices is highlighted through this membership renewal, supporting their ongoing partnership with CALSTART.

data.title: SC debates LA coastal lawsuits against oil firms, moving from state to federal court, typically seen as more favorable. #SupremeCourt #Louisiana #OilCompanies
data.description: The judges deliberated on the issue of whether oil companies, facing lawsuits in Louisiana, could transfer the cases from state to federal court. The move to the federal court system, perceived as more favorable to corporate entities, was being contested.

data.title: Canary Technologies wins 9 categories at HotelTechAwards among 25,000+ hoteliers. Leader in guest experience tech.
data.description: Canary Technologies has been recognized as the leading solution in nine categories of hospitality technology by over 25,000 hoteliers worldwide. The company, based in San Francisco, achieved this feat during the HotelTechAwards held on January 12, 2026. With its innovative hotel guest management technology, Canary Technologies emerged victorious in all nine categories, solidifying its position as the industry leader in this space.

data.title: OpenText completes sale of eDOCS for $163M, to use proceeds to reduce debt. Jan. 12, 2026 /PRNewswire.
data.description: OpenText, based in Waterloo, ON, revealed on Jan. 12, 2026, that it has finalized the sale of its eDOCS on-premise solution, a component of its Analytics division. The company plans to use the proceeds from this divestiture to reduce its debt. Open Text Corporation's stocks are listed on NASDAQ under the symbol OTEX and on the Toronto Stock Exchange as OTEX.

data.title: Wealth Management released a list of "Ten to Watch in 2026" highlighting 10 individuals in the financial industry.
data.description: In New York on January 12, 2026, Wealth Management revealed its highly anticipated Ten to Watch in 2026 list, showcasing 10 influential figures driving innovation in the financial advice sector. This curated selection highlights individuals at the forefront of shaping the industry's future landscape.

data.title: Health Enterprise Partners appoints Roland Lyon as Operating Partner; Lyon has 30+ years experience in healthcare industry.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Health Enterprise Partners (HEP), a prominent private equity firm specializing in healthcare, revealed the appointment of Roland Lyon as an Operating Partner. With over 30 years of experience as a healthcare executive and strategic advisor, Lyon brings valuable expertise to HEP. This move further strengthens HEP's position in the industry and signifies their commitment to strategic growth.
